response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Reference JSON correctly identified no vocal music; scene descriptions match the video content perfectly. 2. subtitles.original: Everyone on YouTube and Chiamise can see.
subtitles.english: Everyone on YouTube and Chiamise can see.

subtitles.original: All right, so I'm going to count down from three. Count down with me, okay?
subtitles.english: All right, so I'm going to count down from three. Count down with me, okay?

subtitles.original: And then I will switch into the new outfit for you guys to see.
subtitles.english: And then I will switch into the new outfit for you guys to see.

subtitles.original: Ready?
subtitles.english: Ready?

subtitles.original: Ready? Give me a "wah" if you're ready!
subtitles.english: Ready? Give me a "wah" if you're ready!

subtitles.original: All right, all right. All right, here we go.
subtitles.english: All right, all right. All right, here we go.

subtitles.original: Three!
subtitles.english: Three!

subtitles.original: Two!
subtitles.english: Two!

subtitles.original: One!
subtitles.english: One!

subtitles.original: Ha!
subtitles.english: Ha!

subtitles.original: Ta-da!
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: All right, it's time to move on to the next song.
subtitles.english: All right, it's time to move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: And I think this song also fits the starry stage perfectly.
subtitles.english: And I think this song also fits the starry stage perfectly.

subtitles.original: Not that one yet, but...
subtitles.english: Not that one yet, but...

subtitles.original: But this one is from one of my favorite franchises,
subtitles.english: But this one is from one of my favorite franchises,

subtitles.original: so I hope you guys listen.
subtitles.english: so I hope you guys listen.

subtitles.original: Anyways, the song will fit the starry stage perfectly.
subtitles.english: Anyways, the song will fit the starry stage perfectly.

subtitles.original: Please give it a listen.
subtitles.english: Please give it a listen.

subtitles.original: The sneak peek part of the show has ended.
subtitles.english: [Text: The sneak peek part of the show has ended.]

subtitles.original: Thank you for watching.
subtitles.english: [Text: Thank you for watching.]
